response.justification: While the candidate has extensive software development experience across multiple languages and domains, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows or direct experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking — all mandatory requirements for this role. His C++ exposure is limited to a brief academic/thesis project and NI LabWindows, which does not meet the 5–10 year professional standard.
strengths: Strong full-stack and polyglot development experience across diverse platforms
Demonstrated expertise in CI/CD, testing, and DevOps practices
Active contributor to open-source and community-driven technical education
concerns: No professional C++ on Windows platform experience as required
Lacks any demonstrable domain knowledge in fixed income or capital markets
SQL experience listed but not contextualized in enterprise financial systems
